certificate.module_name: Cisco ASR 1001 [1][K1], ASR 1002 [2][K2][E1 or E2], ASR1002-X [3][K2], ASR 1004 [4][K3][R1 or R2][E2, E3 or E4], ASR 1006 [5][K4][single or dual E2, E3, E4 or E5][dual R1 or R2] and ASR 1013 [6][K5][E4 or E5][R2]
certificate.caveat: When operated in FIPS mode and when tamper evident labels and security devices are installed on the initially built configuration as indicated in the Security Policy
certificate.description: The ASR 1000 Routers accelerate services by offering performance and resiliency with optimized, intelligent services; establishing a benchmark for price-to-performance offerings in the enterprise routing, service provider edge, and broadband aggregation segments; facilitating significant network innovations in areas such as secure WAN aggregation, managed customer-premises-equipment services, and service provider edge services, and reducing operating expenses and capital expenditures by facilitating managed or hosted services over identical architectures and operating environments.
